admin.title: ArchiMate
admin.hideAll: Disable and hide all ArchiMate types

migrateUnique.title: Migrate to ArchiMate-Only
migrateUnique.description: Remove all standard Turbo EA card types, cards, and relations, keeping only ArchiMate elements. Then seeds the ArchiMate demo dataset.
migrateUnique.descriptionNoDemo: Remove all standard Turbo EA card types, cards, and relations, keeping only ArchiMate elements.
migrateUnique.confirm: This will permanently delete all non-ArchiMate data including card types, cards, and relations, then seed the ArchiMate demo dataset. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
migrateUnique.confirmNoDemo: This will permanently delete all non-ArchiMate data including card types, cards, and relations. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
migrateUnique.success: Migration complete: {{cards}} cards, {{relations}} relations, {{types}} card types, {{rt}} relation types removed. Demo seeded: {{demoCards}} cards, {{demoRels}} relations created.
migrateUnique.successWithDemo: Migration complete: {{cards}} cards, {{relations}} relations, {{types}} card types, {{rt}} relation types removed. Demo seeded: {{demoCards}} cards, {{demoRels}} relations created.
migrateUnique.successNoDemo: Migration complete: {{cards}} cards, {{relations}} relations, {{types}} card types, {{rt}} relation types removed.
migrateUnique.disabled: Standard types are hidden. Re-enable ArchiMate and refresh to make the migration available.
migrateUnique.seedDemoToggle: Seed ArchiMate Demo Cards during migration

missingRelation.title: Create Missing Relation Type
missingRelation.description: The {{relation}} relationship is valid in ArchiMate between {{source}} and {{target}}, but is not yet enabled in this workspace. Create it?
